$description: Component tokens for Mobile Modal component - a container component for modal dialogs and bottom sheets with optional header, body content area, and footer with action buttons. Supports multiple type variants (Default, Info, Success, Warning, Destructive, Custom) and two form variants (Bottom Sheet and Dialogue). Figma Reference: Node ID 292-11181

$component.name: Modal
$component.description: A mobile modal component that provides a container for modal dialogs and bottom sheets. Features optional modal header component, flexible body content area for text or custom content, and optional footer with action buttons. Supports multiple semantic type variants (Default, Info, Success, Warning, Destructive, Custom) for different use cases and two form variants (Bottom Sheet for slide-up panels, Dialogue for centered dialogs).
$component.structure: Container with white background, border, rounded corners, and shadow. Contains three optional sections: header (see modal-header.json), body (content area with padding), and footer (see modal-footer.json). Layout adapts based on form variant affecting border radius and width.

sizes.dialogue: 361px width - Standard dialogue modal width for centered dialogs
sizes.bottom-sheet: 393px width - Standard bottom sheet modal width for slide-up panels
sizes.height: Variable height based on content - accommodates header, body, and footer sections

form.dialogue: Centered dialogue modal - fully rounded corners (8px), narrower width (361px), standard footer padding (12px bottom), no home indicator
form.bottom-sheet: Slide-up bottom sheet modal - rounded top corners only (8px), wider width (393px), extended footer padding (32px bottom), includes home indicator

type.default: Default modal type - neutral styling, standard button colors
type.info: Info modal type - informational content, primary blue button styling
type.success: Success modal type - success/confirmation content, success green button styling
type.warning: Warning modal type - warning content, warning orange button styling with optional discard action
type.destructive: Destructive modal type - destructive/delete content, error red button styling with optional discard action
type.custom: Custom modal type - flexible content slot, customizable button layouts

header.present: Modal header component displayed at top

footer.present: Footer with divider, button groups, and optional home indicator displayed at bottom

usage.contexts: Mobile modal dialogs, confirmation dialogs, alert dialogs, action sheets, bottom sheets, slide-up panels, form modals, delete confirmations, warning dialogs
usage.features: Optional header component, Flexible body content (text or custom slot), Optional footer with action buttons, Multiple semantic type variants, Two form variants (Dialogue/Bottom Sheet), Home indicator for bottom sheets, Divider between body and footer

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile modal - background, border, border radius, shadow, and width

default.description: Mobile modal default border color - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7

all.description: Mobile modal dialogue border radius (all corners) - 8px

left.description: Mobile modal bottom sheet top-left border radius - 8px

right.description: Mobile modal bottom sheet top-right border radius - 8px

default.description: Mobile modal default shadow - outer xl - 0px 20px 24px -4px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.08), 0px 8px 8px -4px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.03)

dialogue.description: Mobile modal dialogue width - 360px (closest to 361px design spec)

bottom-sheet.description: Mobile modal bottom sheet width - 384px (closest to 393px design spec)

body.$comment: Body section tokens - content area with padding

default.description: Mobile modal body default background - neutral/white - #ffffff

content.$comment: Body content tokens - text styling for modal body content

default.description: Mobile modal body default typography - 16px regular, 24px line height

small.description: Mobile modal body small typography - 14px regular, 20px line height

default.description: Mobile modal body default text color - neutral/gray-500 - #667085

custom-slot.$comment: Custom slot tokens - placeholder area for custom content

default.description: Mobile modal custom slot default background - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7

radius.description: Mobile modal custom slot border radius - 4px

y.description: Mobile modal custom slot vertical padding - 8px
